title: wrkout
description: A workout tracker I built to log Push, Pull, and Legs sessions quickly and stay more consistent.

title: Shreyan's Arc
description: An interactive DSA roadmap that helps learners decide what to study next and track daily progress.

title: J-Void
description: A Java practice platform I made to build confidence through focused, hands-on problem solving.

title: WealthWise
description: A client-facing financial planning platform that explains important money decisions in a simpler, more usable way.

title: SpringMart
description: Spring Boot e-commerce backend with CRUD APIs, search, pagination, validation, image handling, and Docker support. The frontend was AI-assisted, and I integrated it manually.

title: Student Management System
description: Java and MySQL admin tool with layered architecture, validated CRUD, flexible search, and SQL-based reports for school demos and small institutes.
